title: Ugly constitutional city-road-faction toy
objective: Use the creator-ratified Sasha identity, human/robot/mixed colony boundary, remaining core decisions, explicit city-comparison authorization, and WP-0001's accepted technical foundation to build an ugly, slice-scale Last Bearing toy that compares the city grammar, proves the selected road-control embodiment in 30 seconds, runs one autonomous faction intent, exercises both module verbs and four preparation permutations, proves all three composition loops and, only under D-0039 / MECHANICAL-COMPOSITIONS, their bounded differentiated staffing mechanics, and persists exact cross-mode consequences.
value: This is the earliest evidence that the city, road, and faction systems form one enjoyable game before generalized architecture or production art begins.
in_scope: Compare the bounded D-0030 placement/logistics/population/scale hypotheses using one primitive district while holding one documented provisional D-0022 camera setup constant.
Implement one visible water bottleneck, Workshop Push, and Civic Buffer preparation states.
Implement and record the creator-selected D-0008 clock policy, explicitly covering settlement production, faction intent, crisis/weather, road movement, pause, and forecast behavior.
Implement the creator-selected D-0007 road-control embodiment in one primitive two-path corridor.
Implement Winch Assembly and Sealed Range Tank with distinct preparation, traversal/command, and return effects.
Run one faction need -> telegraphed intent -> autonomous depot claim -> city/economic consequence loop.
Exercise all four preparation/module permutations with at least two viable strategies.

Under the required RATIFY-SLICE claim, test the provisional slice role bundle by representing Sasha as the persistent player-facing protagonist, colony decision-maker, expedition leader, save addressee, and consequence addressee; prove one human-only, robot-only, and mixed end-to-end loop smoke without crossing the 2x2 matrix; run the differentiated staffing/needs matrix only after D-0039 / MECHANICAL-COMPOSITIONS is creator-bound.
Use WP-0001's ownership transaction and Save Envelope v1 at all supported city/road checkpoints.
Conduct creator play plus at least two additional observed play sessions.

Emit any candidate scenario/control-plane revision and hashes only under `BuildArtifacts/WP-0002/candidate-control-plane/`; A1 cannot edit the protected foundation, registry, or accepted scenario pins.
non_goals: Production art, final UI, narrative volume, or campaign lore.
Production-scale population, city, faction, or road capacity.
Third module, convoy escorts, deep combat, procedural open world, or second faction.
Generalized economy/faction frameworks beyond the slice state.
Final Sasha character model, voice, backstory, pronouns, moral alignment, or final meaning of Atomic Land Pirate; final robot personhood, origin, or society lore.
Automatic merge, rollout, or autonomy promotion.
interfaces: Creator-ratified Sasha protagonist identity + RATIFY-SLICE -> provisional slice decision-maker/expedition-leader/save-addressee/consequence-addressee roles
Typed resident set -> derived human-only/robot-only/mixed composition -> staffing/needs/read models
Preparation state -> expedition timing and city opportunity cost
Faction autonomous intent -> depot claim and doctrine-shaped city consequence
Ownership transaction -> Save Envelope v1 -> canonical outcome comparison

save_impact.summary: S1 additive: add Sasha identity, typed human/robot resident membership and derived composition, plus slice-specific city, module, faction-intent, crisis, and outcome state without redefining WP-0001's accepted envelope/root/pointer contracts.
schema_changes: Add new named protagonist, resident/composition, and slice sections with manifest-declared absence defaults; any touched accepted section must bump its own version and carry a migration.
save_impact.compatibility: WP-0001 golden technical fixtures must remain readable and canonically stable. An old writer cannot rewrite unknown authoritative sections. No distributed player save exists, but fixture compatibility is still a release gate.

acceptance_tests.oracle: Protected, sealed receipts resolve every value-sensitive identity/core constraint and explicit AUTHORIZE-CITY-COMPARISON claim required by the ugly-gameplay-toy gate before implementation starts.

Before any WP-0002 command runs, the creator verifies and receipt-binds a disposable exact-base quarantine with protected foundation/governance/receipt/release state non-writable, only packet-declared outputs writable, no merge or release credentials, a complete command/diff/artifact record, and a creator-operated import-or-reject boundary; no other A1 packet is active.

After a creator-bound D-0039 / MECHANICAL-COMPOSITIONS claim, the exact one-cohort/one-unit cases prove human food/water/rest dependency and repair capability, robot power/maintenance dependency and tool capability, and a mixed complementary assignment/shared-power choice; all exact resident sets survive save/load with no substitution.

Human-only, robot-only, and mixed cases each complete the same bounded city need through commitment, expedition, return, and save path with exact resident sets and no hidden human dependency; this is not multiplied across the four preparation/module cases.
The creator can compare the bounded city grammars under one hash-recorded provisional D-0022 camera configuration and ratify/supersede D-0030 before M2 generalization.
For the selected D-0008 value, settlement, faction, crisis/weather, and road clocks advance or pause exactly as declared across departure, road play, player pause, auto-pause, encounter, and return.
A new player identifies and acts on the water bottleneck within five minutes without external instruction.
The selected road-control mode is understandable and pleasurable enough to continue within 30 seconds on keyboard and controller.
Both modules create distinct preparation, route/action, capacity, and return consequences.
All four preparation/module permutations complete, at least two remain viable, and at least two returns change the next city decision.
Waiting without departure allows the telegraphed faction claim to advance and alter depot/world/city state independently.
Faction doctrine changes one recipe, maintenance burden, obligation, institution, or logistics decision and two later behaviors.
Every supported checkpoint in every permutation reloads to the canonical outcome with no duplicate/lost state.
The creator and at least two observers describe the central fantasy as building/caring for a home rather than collecting loot.

triggers: City grammar fails creator comprehension or manipulation preference.
Selected road-control mode fails the 30-second play gate.
The four paths collapse to one dominant or scripted solution.
Faction behavior remains reactive reputation rather than autonomous state.
steps: Freeze and preserve toy build, playtest notes, seeds, saves, videos, and failing scenarios.
Return the failed decision to provisional/open with evidence instead of generalizing the kernel.
Revert the toy feature branch while retaining the accepted WP-0001 technical foundation.
Open one narrower comparison packet for the failed city, road, faction, or coupling seam.
rollback.save_recovery: No distributed player saves exist. Discard the disposable toy profile, or inspect an older good generation read-only and continue only at generation 1 in a distinct slot_id/save_id lineage with completed rollback-fork provenance and rejected descendants quarantined outside recovery scan. Never repoint a writable old slot to an ancestor.
